message:
🌱 Add redpanda: Handle unsupported topic configurations as no-op via an mission (#1523)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "redpanda-4149-handle-unsupported-topic-configurations-as-no-op-via-an-allowlist",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "redpanda: Handle unsupported topic configurations as no-op via an allowlist",
+    "description": "Handle unsupported topic configurations as no-op via an allowlist. Requested by 14+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current redpanda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your redpanda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nhelm list -n redpanda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working redpanda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review redpanda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant redpanda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nkubectl get configmap -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=redpanda\n```\n### Who is this for and what problem do they have today?\n\nExisting Kafka API clients that configure topics with properties that are not relevant for Redpanda."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Handle unsupported topic configurations as no-op via an…",
+        "description": "## Cover letter\n\nSkip topic configuration propeties that are not relevant for Redpanda, but used to configure Kafka\n\nAdded allowlist for all Kafka properties that are unsupported in Redpanda\r\n\n### Improvements\n\n* Alter topic configuration not fail if gets unsupported properties\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n redpanda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=redpanda\nkubectl get events -n redpanda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Handle unsupported topic configurations as no-op via an…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Cover letter\n\nSkip topic configuration propeties that are not relevant for Redpanda, but used to configure Kafka\n\nAdded allowlist for all Kafka properties that are unsupported in Redpanda\r\n\n### Improvements\n\n* Alter topic configuration not fail if gets unsupported properties",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
